arts.ttl: Maresca has ‘no doubt’ he has the backing of Chelsea’s owners
arts.sum: Enzo Maresca has insisted he retains the full support of Chelsea’s owners. While the Blues advanced to the semi-finals of the Uefa Conference League on Thursday, the 2-1 loss at home to Legia Warsaw drew boos from some of the home fans at Stamford Bridge. arts.ttl: Talks held: Chelsea & Newcastle contact Bundesliga star’s agent over potential transfer
arts.sum: Chelsea and Newcastle United are reportedly pursuing a potential summer transfer window swoop for Bayern Munich centre-back Kim Min-jae. The South Korea international has not quite been at his best since joining Bayern, despite previously impressing a great deal in spells at Napoli and Fenerbahce. arts.ttl: Six Premier League clubs ex-Chelsea boss Carlo Ancelotti could join after Real Madrid claim
arts.sum: A return to the Premier League, where he's previously managed Chelsea and Everton, is a possibility. Former Chelsea manager Carlo Ancelotti is rumoured to be departing Real Madrid at the end of the season.

arts.ttl: Enzo Maresca fires BRUTAL warning to Cole Palmer
arts.sum: Enzo Maresca has warned Cole Palmer and Nicolas Jackson that Chelsea will fail to qualify for next season’s Champions League if they are unable to end their respective goal droughts. When asked whether Chelsea will be able to qualify for the Champions League if Palmer and Jackson continue to flounder in front of goal, Maresca bluntly admitted: “No.
